programme.desc: After an explosion in a bio lab, the CSI team races to determine which nerve agent left one of their own unconscious, while the others explore a dangerous underground tunnel.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE Ep18
programme.desc: When Dim goes missing, Officer Chen and Sergeant Bradford, along with the CIA, set out to find him and enlist the help of Juicy.

programme.title: FBI: MOST WANTED Ep13
programme.desc: When two sorority sisters are found stabbed to death, the Fugitive Task Force heads to Virginia to hunt down the suspect before more killings occur.

programme.title: ROOKIE BLUE Ep07
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic --or, at the very least, a gifted conman --enters 15 Division to help find a missing witness, the officers are forced to come face-to-face about themselves.

programme.title: NCIS: ORIGINS Ep15
programme.desc: The team investigates the brutal murder of a military sergeant found burned in her car, a case Franks suspects could have a connection to the assault of his estranged wife, Tish.

programme.title: THE TRAITORS UK Ep01
programme.desc: The ultimate game of detection, backstabbing and trust, but who will survive?

programme.title: Dear David
programme.desc: Shortly after comic artist Adam responds to Internet trolls, he begins experiencing sleep paralysis while an empty rocking chair moves in the corner of his apartment. As he chronicles increasingly malevolent occurrences in a series of tweets, Adam begins to believe he is being haunted by the ghost of a dead child named David. Encouraged by his boss to continue the 'Dear David' thread, Adam starts to lose his grip on what is real.

programme.title: Hoon Payon
programme.desc: A young lad travels to a remote temple on an island to visit his brother, who has been living as a monk there. But he learns that his brother has gone missing after being framed for murder and theft. He decides to stay to investigate his brother's disappearance and to clear his name, only to discover more mysterious deaths in the adjacent village.

programme.title: Anything For Jackson
programme.desc: The sudden death of their only grandson, Jackson, prove to be too much grief for the overly religious elderly couple, Audrey and Dr Henry. Being Satanists, they uncover a spell that will allow them to resurrect Jackson in another vessel. They kidnap a pregnant woman with the intention of performing a 'reverse exorcism' by putting Jackson's essence into the woman's unborn child. Instead, the old couple accidentally open a portal to purgatory when various souls desire the vessel.

programme.title: Kulit
programme.desc: Satu demi satu pembunuhan misteri berlaku di sebuah perkampungan di Kelantan, di mana kulit mangsa akan di ambil dan dipercayai untuk dijadikan wayang kulit.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Stalker
programme.desc: A young woman lives alone in a rented rooftop house. However, she cannot help shaking the feeling that she is not alone. After a bizarre experience, she slowly learns the truth about what happened in the house.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Teman Tidur
programme.desc: Amanda, a transfer student lives in a dormitory. She becomes close to Adam, and his gang. Their closeness triggers a cynical reaction from Davin, an excellent student. Still depressed over the death of his best friend, Kelly who committed suicide because of his viral erotic video, he suspects the Adam Gang spreads the video. Slowly, Kelly's spirit comes to haunt them through video chat terror, asking for justice for her death.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 2
programme.desc: When her student Ritsuko disappears, Ryoko is desperate to find her. When she discovers that Ritsuko was playing a strange online game of hide and seek, she begins to wonder if it could be related to her disappearance somehow. Ryoko then discovers that the game is more sinister than it appeared at first. It is linked to demonology and the supernatural. Will she be able to get past her fears and superstitions to discover what secrets the game of hide and seek might hold?

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: Iris, an architect, suffers from frequent hallucinations due to post-traumatic stress disorder after losing her younger sister to a kidnapping syndicate. Her ex-lover, Job, also an architect, invites her to go to Japan where he has been given the job of restoring a 100-year-old house belonging to Riku Watanabe. In Japan, they meet Aki and a fellow Filipino, Len, who is an intern. Soon, Iris is haunted by angry-looking yureis (Japanese ghosts) and learns about human sacrifices carried out at the house they are restoring.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Tangisan Kubur
programme.desc: Salah seorang dari junior forensic mula didatangi oleh 'hantu' wanita mangsa bunuh. Dia dan rakan-rakan forensiknya mula membongkar rahsia wanita itu yang embawa mereka ke sebuah estet. Dan estet itu menyimpan satu rahsia yang mengerikan.

programme.title: Karya 12 - Alien Janda Baik
programme.desc: Kisah tentang sekumpulan makhluk asing yang terhempas di bumi dan cuba mencari jalan pulang. Pelbagai kejadian pelik terpaksa ditempuhi demi untuk pulang ke tempat asal.

programme.title: It Came From Below
programme.desc: While he was alive, Jessie's dad was passionate about tracking down a monster that was believed to dwell deep inside one of the local caves. He was often dismissed as a lunatic. Jessie's dad unexpectedly dies on one of his expeditions in the cave, leaving her in a depressive state. Her brother, Sam, and his friends Joanna and Marty try to get her out of her funk. The four of them decide to go spelunking in the cave with the ultimate aim of finding the monster and proving that Jessie and Sam's dad was right about the monster. In spite of warnings from the park rangers, they head into the cave where they find all the evidence they wanted. Problem is, will they ever get out alive to show it to anyone?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Jackal
programme.desc: Jimmy Levine is a deprogrammer hired by Andrew Powell to rescue his son, Justin, from a murderous cult. The Powell family also consists of Andrew's wife Kathy, older son Campbell, Justin's girlfriend Samantha, as well as Justin and Samantha's baby, Zoey. They have gathered at Andrew's cabins in the woods to stage an intervention. Jimmy and Andrew stage a kidnapping and manage to get Justin back into the cabin. Strangely, in spite of various methods, Jimmy and the Powells simply cannot get through to Justin, who appears to have been thoroughly brainwashed. The cultists quickly track Justin down and surround the cabin. Beseiged, the occupants of the cabin are lured into traps one by one, and murdered in the most horrific ways imaginable. Finally, only Justin, Samantha and Zoey remain.

programme.title: Sis Ngesot
programme.desc: A band 'Sudu Garfu and The Napkins' is recording at 'Jinggles Studio' which is owned by a famous composer, Syafihi. While filming, the lights suddenly go out. Syafihi heads to the main switch box trying to fix the electricity, to no avail. Suddenly, the door to the studio is mysteriously locked and the band is visited by a strange ghost called 'Sis Ngesot' that appears from a corner of the room.

programme.title: Jenny
programme.desc: A young woman's answer to a horror Bloody Mary challenge turns awry as she instead unleashes an evil spirit from her past to return to her life.

programme.title: Crystal Inferno
programme.desc: At the 20th floor of a skyscraper, a gas leak has started a fire. Anne and Ben Bronson, two teenage kids, are trapped in a fiery inferno 20 storeys above the ground, while the fire is spreading throughout the entire building. From the 60th floor, their parents, Brianna and Tom, who were about to sign their divorce papers, will have to fight together to save their family from the flames. Even if Brianna is a brilliant structural engineer, will she find out a way to stop this uncontrolled fire?

programme.title: Mary
programme.desc: David buys a sailing boat that had been abandoned by the Coast Guard. He takes his wife Sarah, daughters Lindsey and Mary, Lindsey's boyfriend Tommy and David's friend Mike on a trip to Bermuda. The boat is christened Mary. While out at sea, tensions grow between the crew. Mary is acting strangely, while the already strained marriage between David and Sarah are further tested. Then, Tommy inexplicably attacks David. After committing him to an asylum, they hear that Tommy hanged himself. David and Sarah agree to turn around and abandon their disastrous trip, but more tragedy is in store for the journey home.

programme.title: Hantu Tok Mudim
programme.desc: Tok Mudim is the greatest ritual circumciser in his village whose reputation is tarnished when his assistant, Lebai Kulup, gets involved in a love triangle with Salmah, the prettiest girl in the village, and Borhan son of the Tok Penghulu. Due to his love for Salmah, Borhan meets Tok Mudim for a secret operation. Unbeknown to them, Lebai Kulup decides to sabotage the operation. Due to the failed operation, Tok Mudim is hunted by the villagers, and falls into a well to his death.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Pengantin Malam
programme.desc: A woman named Maya suffers from amnesia after a car accident. Ever since then, she is often haunted by a mysterious figure. Maya's husband, Razif, decides to take his wife to recuperate at his family villa.

programme.title: Fearsome
programme.desc: Seungyeon and his band are feeling uninspired, and decide to take a break in Chuncheon. While there, they put on a great show at a local club and are offered a seemingly great contract that comes with accommodation. After arriving at the dormitory, Jaehyuk gets an eerie feeling about the place. One by one, all the band members begin to hear creepy voices as though they are being watched. Almost as though ... they are not alone in the house...

programme.title: Panggilan Arwah
programme.desc: Amin yang sering diganggu oleh bayangan misteri seorang wanita yang terseksa di alam barzakh harus merungkai misteri mimpinya itu. Lakonan Zizan Nin & Tasha Shilla.

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Ditched
programme.desc: After a routine prison transfer crashes in the forest, young Inuit paramedic Melina finds herself surrounded by murderers with a mere 100 feet to climb out of a ditch to escape. When they are attacked by an unseen force in the forest, Melina's short journey to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 3
programme.desc: The third installation in the horror series is themed on 'solo hide and seek,' a seance technique famous as an urban legend. Sakura Kurata and Kosuke Tsukamoto are members of the movie club at their high school. They organize a movie shoot which revolves around the urban legend and occult game 'hide-and-seek alone'. The game involves a ritual with a doll to contact the dead. The students persuade a teacher to allow them to shoot the movie at midnight in the school. The students begin filming, and they soon experience a lot more than they expected.

programme.title: SCHOOL OF ROCK
programme.desc: A man redefines teaching by transforming his students into a high-voltage rock band.

programme.desc: An internet coder is sent to test and evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of his CEO's experiment in artificial intelligence.

programme.title: THE DEBT
programme.desc: A former Mossad agent discovers a present truth that makes her question her past in this espionage thriller.

programme.desc: An ex-homicide detective with memory loss is forced to solve a brutal murder he can't recall.

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a man from Chennai, takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from his enemies.

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: An ex-convict is bent on revenge against the people responsible for his wrongful imprisonment but is pit against his estranged son who is now a police officer.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire Ranveer Malhotra goes against all odds and takes on some life-threatening obstacles in a bid for survival on an aeroplane after his manufacturing company deals with a massive fiasco.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
programme.desc: Nanhe, a tourist guide in Jaisalmer, is obsessed with his favourite actor, Bobby Deol. His dreams turn into reality when he learns that Bobby is visiting his city for a film shoot.

programme.title: Santa Banta Pvt. Ltd.
programme.desc: Passed off as spies, two inept pals are sent to Fiji to rescue a kidnapped bureaucrat. Soon enough, they're creating more problems than they're solving.

programme.title: Udta Punjab
programme.desc: A story that revolves around drug abuse in the affluent north Indian State of Punjab and how the youth there have succumbed to it en-masse resulting in a socio-economic decline.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor, a reserved Muslim porter, falls in love with Mukku, the beautiful and rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest. But their love is put to the test amid misunderstandings and nature's wrath.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.desc: A story that revolves around drug abuse in the affluent north Indian State of Punjab and how the youth there have succumbed to it en-masse resulting in a socio-economic decline.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor, a reserved Muslim porter, falls in love with Mukku, the beautiful and rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest. But their love is put to the test amid misunderstandings and nature's wrath.

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya.

programme.title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
programme.desc: Satyendra and Aarti meet for an arranged marriage and fall in love. Things go downhill when she runs away on their wedding day to pursue her career.

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.
